statement: In every magma, Equation 3037 (`x = ((y * (z * w)) * z) * w`) implies Equation 4275 (`x * (x * x) = y * (y * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0464
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z w)) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op x x)) = (op y (op y x))
